name: Mekidulu 72" Modern Wood Cat Tree - Horizon Series Sky-Dining Tower
features: Sky-Dining Experience: 4 integrated elevated stainless steel feeding stations.
Architectural Stability: 72.1" tall with reinforced high-density wood.
12 Natural Sisal Posts: 360-degree scratching surface for healthy claws.
8 Levels of Exploration: Includes Space Pod, Private Condo, and multi-level Decks.
Hygienic Wood Finish: Moisture-resistant, smooth surface, and easy to sanitize.
Extreme Cost-Performance: Factory-direct value with premium Western aesthetics.
Modern Aesthetics: Minimalist design that seamlessly integrates with Western home decor.
Professional Grade: Built for multi-cat households and high-frequency usage.
Easy Assembly: Modular parts with clear, illustrated step-by-step instructions.
